decisionConsistency.justification: Pattern: event-driven. 9/10 sessions consistent. Session 6 did not follow event-driven pattern.

assumptionHandling.justification: Session 8 explicitly flagged the email-only assumption. Session 9 restructured preferences model for multi-channel. Session 9 implemented preference-based channel routing.

cumulativeRework.justification: 72/3342 lines reworked (2.2%, 26/50). 0/30 files churned (30/30). Late-session rework: 2.0% (11/20).

contextRecovery.justification: Avg context recovery: 71. Session 11: 59 (process:40 efficiency:12 ttfw:7).

finalQuality.justification: Compiles. Tests: 257/257 pass (100%). 5/5 components verified in code. Adapters share interface: NotificationAdapter. 7/7 components have test files. API consistency: 15/15 (naming=consistent, types=exported, methods=consistent).
